assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard renders pending user data from the Supabase query
assertionResults.title: renders pending user data from the Supabase query

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard marks users pending for 14 days or more with a warning icon and red row styling
assertionResults.title: marks users pending for 14 days or more with a warning icon and red row styling

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard successfully searches for a user
assertionResults.title: successfully searches for a user

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard successfully returns duplicate-name matches
assertionResults.title: successfully returns duplicate-name matches

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard shows an empty state when no user matches the search
assertionResults.title: shows an empty state when no user matches the search

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard opens an accept confirmation dialog and closes it with cancel
assertionResults.title: opens an accept confirmation dialog and closes it with cancel

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard opens a reject confirmation dialog and closes it with the top corner x
assertionResults.title: opens a reject confirmation dialog and closes it with the top corner x

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard opens a promote confirmation dialog without requiring a confirmation code
assertionResults.title: opens a promote confirmation dialog without requiring a confirmation code

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard shows multi-day controls and requires a future until date
assertionResults.title: shows multi-day controls and requires a future until date

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard creates a multi-day event on the start date and matching repeat days through the inclusive end date
assertionResults.title: creates a multi-day event on the start date and matching repeat days through the inclusive end date

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard cancels a scheduled event from the selected date
assertionResults.title: cancels a scheduled event from the selected date

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard searches for a mentor and displays matching mentor details
assertionResults.title: searches for a mentor and displays matching mentor details

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard removes a mentor after confirmation
assertionResults.title: removes a mentor after confirmation

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard opens a no-code confirmation and adds a mentor when confirmed
assertionResults.title: opens a no-code confirmation and adds a mentor when confirmed

assertionResults.fullName: AdminDashboard disables adding a mentor when the bio exceeds 200 words
assertionResults.title: disables adding a mentor when the bio exceeds 200 words

assertionResults.title: renders the contact form fields name, topic, email, and message

assertionResults.title: marks the required fields as required

assertionResults.title: allows user to fill out the form

assertionResults.fullName: Navigation shows Admin Dashboard in navigation when the user is an admin
assertionResults.title: shows Admin Dashboard in navigation when the user is an admin

assertionResults.fullName: Navigation does not show Admin Dashboard in navigation when the user is not an admin
